# Email Module

Module ID: email
Status: available
Purpose: Transactional email module with provider-neutral ports and a Resend HTTP adapter.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Provider: Resend over fetch, POST https://api.resend.com/emails
Secret: RESEND_API_KEY
Primary use case: sendEmail(input, deps)
Adapters: adapters/resend, adapters/d1, adapters/memory
Safety: production sends are external side effects; require approval and idempotency for retries.
